menu.title: General Settings

field.name: log_level
field.description: Choose the logging severity level printed to the output stream.

field.name: log_format
field.description: JSON outputs a structured object block. PLAIN outputs flat key-value strings.

field.name: prefix
field.description: An optional prefix prepended to each log entry for easy filtering.

field.name: include_timestamp
field.description: Toggles injecting UTC/local ISO timestamps alongside logged metadata.

menu.info: Logs are written directly to the application standard output stream (stdout) and are visible in the console.

menu.title: View Logs
menu.info: Showing the last 100 lines from the archived log file. Click Refresh to reload.
